name: Moyez Rabbani
headline: Software engineer specializing in AI voice agents, LLM applications, RAG systems, full-stack SaaS, and cloud microservices.
summary: I build production AI and full-stack systems quickly, from customer discovery through deployment. Recent work includes voice AI agents, RAG chatbots, browser automation, SaaS products, Azure services, observability, and customer-facing internal tools.

experience.title: Lead Software Engineer / Founding Engineer
highlights: Designed and launched OneSpec, an AI phone answering service for home service businesses handling 200+ daily calls, lead qualification, and appointment booking.
Self-hosted LiveKit agent servers with Docker and virtual machines, integrating Telnyx telephony for low-latency voice responses under 300ms.
Built asynchronous microservices with BullMQ, Redis, scalable workers, serverless functions, and production observability.
Shipped Nemo Cares, a voice-first caregiving platform with automated phone medication reminders and 96% successful call delivery across 50+ active care recipients.
Built RAG-powered AI chatbots for municipal governments and enterprise clients using Azure AI Search, Azure Document Intelligence, embeddings, and LLM response generation.
Created a custom CRM and ticketing system that consolidated 3+ tools, saving roughly 20 hours per week and $4,800 annually.
Generated 500,000+ Reddit impressions within 16 hours while validating go-to-market for Nemo Cares.

experience.title: Software Engineer
highlights: Built a production e-commerce platform with cart, wishlist, coupons, OTP authentication, and Razorpay payments for 5,000+ monthly visitors.
Improved page-load performance by 75% with Next.js static generation and frontend optimization.

projects: OneSpec - AI phone answering and scheduling for home service businesses.
Nemo Cares - voice-first caregiving and medication reminder platform.

narratives.whyLooking: I am looking for a role where I can build high-impact AI and product engineering systems with more ownership, faster shipping cycles, and closer contact with customers.
narratives.careerGoal: My goal is to become a deeply reliable founding or senior engineer who can turn ambiguous business problems into shipped, measurable software.
narratives.whyLeftPreviousCompany: I am optimizing for stronger product ownership, technical depth, and teams where fast execution and customer empathy are central to the work.

traits: learns new technology on the fly
rules: Think from a busy founder, recruiter, or HR person's perspective.
